entry.title: Abandonment Issues
entry.content:
I’ve moved my blog from WordPress on my own personal site to GitHub, because … GitHub of course. No One is going to miss my other blog. It had a couple of what I thought were interesting posts on F# and dependency injection in C#. But it’s time for a fresh start.

Expect posts on JavaScript and front end development for a little while. After a career spent designing relational databases for finance, insurance and other LOB domains, I’ve been working on SPA style front end enterprise applications for a couple of years. And it’s fun. I may actually have a couple of interesting things to say. We’ll see.
